segments.original_text: あってないよっていいそんな風に見えません これだけ

segments.text: The damage off grabs is building up!
segments.original_text: 掴みから 火力が痛い%増えてきた

segments.text: Up tilt's scary too, plus the fair ready. After the getup—oh, he's attacking from there!
segments.original_text: 上強も怖いぞ 空前だし受け身の展開うわぁそこから攻めてくるか

full_text: Those aren't connecting! The damage off grabs is building up! Up tilt's scary too, plus the fair ready. After the getup—oh, he's attacking from there!

corrections.original: そうから伝えてくるか
corrections.corrected: そこから攻めてくるか
